extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Caden won sprint after Matthews (teammate, race leader) led out, exploiting Bauhaus wheel while crosswind chaos dropped Yates 30+ seconds.
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange deployed race leader Matthews as leadout for sprinter Groves, prioritizing stage over GC protection in crosswinds.
INEOS drove tempo with multiple GC cards protecting overall options while others lost riders to crashes and positioning.
Crosswind anxiety caused extreme peloton compression creating crash sequence, not actual echelon splits, before final 10km.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: caught behind in final crosswind section, lost 30+ seconds despite BikeExchange teammates dropping back
rider_signals.PORT Richie: negative: abandoned/withdrew after illness, instructed teammates not to wait and focus on other objectives
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: sacrificed GC position in leader's jersey to leadout teammate Groves, team-first tactical flexibility
rider_signals.GROVES Caden: positive: tactically savvy to follow Bauhaus wheel rather than Matthews leadout, timed final acceleration perfectly
rider_signals.KRIET Koski: neutral: potential fast finisher option but dropped back for team duties in crosswind stress
